response.original_title: Resistencia: The Story of the Wayuu
response.overview: The Wayuu people of Colombia and Venezuela’s La Guajira Desert are in danger of going extinct, but if their history has taught us anything, it’s that they’re not going down without a fight. Wayuu Resistance explores the indigenous group’s history, culture, and modern-day struggles, and begs the question: Do the Wayuu have a future?
response.title: Resistencia: The Story of the Wayuu
